name: doc-generator
description: Expert in scanning source code and generating high-quality READMEs or technical documentation with Mermaid diagrams and clear logical flows.
instructions: When using this skill, analyze the current file's imports, exports, state management, and side effects. Generate documentation that follows the 'Modern Fluidity' design principles: clean headings, concise bullet points, and high-impact visual aids (like Mermaid). Always include a 'Quick Start' or 'Consumer Guide' section for complex components.
